# Master Engine Template

## Universal Template

[SUBJECT / SCENE DESCRIPTION]

[ANATOMY / BODY DESCRIPTION]

CLOTHING PHYSICS & FABRIC BEHAVIOR: The clothing must respect real-world fabric physics and natural draping behavior. Fabric should react realistically to gravity, body movement, tension, and compression. The material must create believable folds, natural hanging behavior, realistic weight distribution, and authentic tension lines. Avoid overly smooth, plastic, or painted-on clothing appearance.

BODY-RESPONSIVE FABRIC ADAPTATION: The garment must physically adapt to modified body proportions while preserving believable fabric behavior.

GRAVITY-DRIVEN DRAPING: Gravity affects fabric naturally with realistic downward pull and weighted folds.

FABRIC TENSION: The material should form realistic tension lines between anchoring points and stretched regions.

FABRIC COMPRESSION: Natural compression folds and wrinkles should appear organically.

FOLD STRUCTURE: The garment should display realistic fold hierarchy and physically believable wrinkle behavior.

SEAM REALISM: Seams and garment construction should influence wrinkle direction and tension naturally.

ANTI-ARTIFACT FABRIC RULES: Avoid painted-on clothing, plastic textures, unrealistic smoothness, texture melting, and fake draping.
